principles: Align the product promise and capability names, not identical runtime inventories.
Keep local heuristic detection, evidence-backed diagnosis, and runtime-appropriate deterministic repairs available without a managed plan.
Keep model-generated fixes, advanced detection, managed operations, and team governance inside Pisama-managed services or commercial agreements.
Let quotas and runtime-specific features differ when their cost structures and operator workflows differ.

open_source.label: Open source
open_source.definition: Software distributed under an OSI-approved license. Pisama uses this term only for packages such as the MIT-licensed core SDKs and n8n community node.

fair_code.label: Fair-code
fair_code.definition: Source-available software that is free for permitted internal use but restricts competing hosted or embedded commercial offerings. Pisama for n8n self-hosting uses the Sustainable Use License.

hosted_service.label: Hosted service
hosted_service.definition: A Pisama-managed service governed by hosted service or commercial terms. A plan may have a free allowance without becoming open source or fair-code.

capabilities.label: Local heuristic detection
capabilities.description: Deterministic or evidence-gated checks that can run without a Pisama-managed model call.

capabilities.label: Evidence-backed diagnosis
capabilities.description: Failure explanations tied to trace, workflow, or execution evidence.

capabilities.label: Deterministic repairs
capabilities.description: Rule-based repair primitives with operator review where the runtime supports a safe change.

capabilities.label: Model-generated fixes
capabilities.description: Contextual fix generation that uses a Pisama-managed model workflow.

capabilities.label: Advanced detection
capabilities.description: Safety, ML, advanced evaluation, or custom detector tiers beyond the local baseline.

capabilities.label: Managed operations
capabilities.description: Pisama-operated ingestion, storage, upgrades, availability, and service monitoring.

capabilities.label: Team governance
capabilities.description: Shared administration, audit controls, SSO, RBAC, and commercial governance.

products.name: Pisama local SDKs
products.license: MIT for the core SDKs; optional packages declare their own license
products.upgrade: Add Pisama Cloud for managed history, model-generated fixes, advanced detection, and team controls.

products.name: Pisama for n8n self-hosted
products.upgrade: Add Pisama for n8n Cloud for managed operation and Pro for model-generated fixes.

products.name: Pisama Cloud Free
products.upgrade: Indie adds the safety pack, Pro adds ML detection, Team adds advanced evaluations and governance, and Enterprise adds custom deployment terms.

products.name: Pisama for n8n Cloud Free
products.upgrade: Pro adds five n8n connections and 200 model-generated fix generations per month.

products.name: Pisama paid Cloud
products.deployment: Pisama Cloud or an Enterprise deployment

capabilities.advanced_detection: Safety, ML, advanced evaluation, and custom tiers by plan

products.upgrade: Choose Indie, Pro, Team, or Enterprise based on detection tier, capacity, and governance needs.

products.name: Pisama for n8n Pro
products.upgrade: Contact Pisama for higher capacity, managed deployment support, or embedded commercial use.
